observedMutationClass: Rule harness did not continuously surface broad cleanup candidates or auto-queue verified low-risk delete/simplify cleanup work.
acceptanceEvidenceClass: rule harness fixture tests and pipeline dry-run; no gameplay, Unity runtime, or WebGL product acceptance evidence
rootCause: The 4-role harness only converted existing rule/static findings into batches. Simplification candidates lived in a separate workflow script, delete_file was not a first-class mutation operation, and move/delete/simplify candidates were not represented in role reports.
prevention: Tech-debt review now emits cleanupCandidates, review-work converts configured delete_unused and simplify_inline candidates into guarded batches, move_owner stays report-only, delete_file has rollback snapshots plus stale token/GUID reference guards, and fixture tests cover delete/simplify/move classification. The existing hard-fail coverage for active plan artifact owner shape drift, active plan concrete artifact owner collision, and progress evidence overload remains preserved.
verification: Ran powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\tools\rule-harness\tests\Run-RuleHarnessTests.ps1; ran powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\tools\rule-harness\run-harness-pipeline.ps1 -RepoRoot (Get-Location).Path -ConfigPath .\tools\rule-harness\config.json -OutputRoot .\Temp\RuleHarnessRoles -DryRun.
